sub_sims.s_expr:
(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: Another year. Supply ship arrives from Earth. The colony feels hopeful. My faith grows stronger.
Population: 14. Supply ship arrives from Earth. I spent the year on mediation. Closest to Phobos.
Year 20 on Mars. Supply ship arrives from Earth. Morale is hopeful. We have 1372 food units left.
